info.name: Tax-Advisory Deep Agent
info.description:
Endpoints for the German tax-advisory Deep Agent (FastAPI). Upload a DATEV CSV/XLS to create a session, then chat with the supervisor via Server-Sent Events.

## Quick start
1. Start the API: `uv run uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --port 8000`
2. Run **Health** — expect `{"status":"ok"}`.
3. Set the `access_token` collection variable to a valid Entra access token (audience `api://<client-id>/access_as_user`). Without it every `/tax-advisory/*` call returns 401. The easiest way to get one in dev is to sign in to the frontend and copy `session.accessToken` from the browser dev tools, or use `az account get-access-token --resource api://<client-id>`.
4. Run **Create session** — the test script saves `session_id` into the `session_id` collection variable.
5. Run **Send message (SSE)** — Postman shows the raw `event:` / `data:` stream in the response body.

## Auth
The collection uses Bearer auth at the collection level (every request inherits it). `Health` and `OpenAPI schema` override this with `noauth` because they are public.

## SSE in Postman
Postman renders an SSE response as raw text (it does not parse `event:`/`data:` lines). Each event terminates with a blank line. Use **Send and Download** for long streams or switch to **Raw** view.

## Variables
- `base_url` — default `http://127.0.0.1:8000`
- `access_token` — Entra ID access token used for `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
- `session_id` — populated automatically by the Create-session test script
- `datev_file_path` — absolute or relative path to a DATEV CSV/XLS on disk (Postman cannot send a file from a URL)

request.description: Liveness probe. Returns `{"status":"ok"}`. Public — no auth required.
Full OpenAPI 3 schema for the API.

formdata.description: Optional DATEV EXTF Buchungsstapel CSV or Excel file. Omit for a text-only session.
Optional JSON with master data (legal_form, skr_variant, prior_year_net_turnover, …).

request.description:
Ingest a DATEV export, normalize it to the virtual ledger, detect SKR03/SKR04, and create an in-memory session. Both files are optional — see *Create session (text only)* for the fileless variant. Returns:
```json
{
  "session_id": "…",
  "ledger_rows": 0,
  "skr_variant": "SKR03",
  "master_data_complete": false,
  "missing_fields": ["legal_form", "prior_year_net_turnover", …]
}
```
`master_data_complete` is a convenience flag (`= missing_fields.length === 0`) signalling whether the four REQUIRED master-data fields (`legal_form`, `skr_variant`, `prior_year_net_turnover`, `current_year_turnover`) are all present. If `false`, the client should collect the missing values via the interview and feed them back in via *Send message — provide master data*.

The test script stores `session_id` into the collection variable of the same name so the next request can use it.

**File field**: in Postman, click the `datev_file` row and pick a file from disk (the `src` is templated to `{{datev_file_path}}` for convenience but Postman will let you override it inline).

Create a session with **no uploads** — for free-form German tax Q&A without a DATEV ledger. Both `datev_file` and `master_data_file` are optional, so an empty multipart body is valid. Response shape is identical to the DATEV variant but with `ledger_rows: 0` and `skr_variant: null`.

The ledger-aware tool (`ledger_compute`) will return a graceful *ledger not found* error if invoked in this mode, and files can still be attached later via *Attach file to session*.

formdata.description: CSV or Excel file. Saved under the agent's virtual `/uploads/` folder and catalogued in `/uploads/_index.json`.

request.description:
Attach an additional CSV or Excel file to an existing session. The agent receives a system note pointing at the new virtual path and reads the file per the *user-uploaded-files* skill. Use this to add files to a text-only session or to provide supplementary data alongside the DATEV ledger.

Returns the catalog entry:
```json
{
  "original_name": "…",
  "virtual_path": "/uploads/…",
  "rows": 0,
  "columns": ["…"]
}
```

Stream the supervisor agent's reasoning, tool calls, and final answer as Server-Sent Events. Event types emitted:

| event        | data                                                                 |
|--------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `token`      | streamed text/tool-call chunks from the model                        |
| `tool_start` | `{ "tool": "<tool_name>" }`                                          |
| `tool_end`   | `{ "tool": "<tool_name>" }`                                          |
| `final`      | `{ "content": <final assistant message content list> }`              |
| `error`      | `{ "error": "…" }`                                                   |
| `done`       | `[DONE]` — always sent last                                          |

The session is in-memory only; restarting uvicorn invalidates `session_id`.
Same endpoint as above; reuses the stored `session_id` so the agent has prior conversation context.
Example of feeding the interview answers back to the agent in plain text so it can complete the §19 UStG check.

variable.description: Entra ID access token (audience api://<client-id>/access_as_user) used for Bearer auth on /tax-advisory/* routes.
Local path Postman uses for the formdata file field. Override per environment.
